title: cyclosorus elatus
intro: Cyclosorus elatus, also known as the Mountain Fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Blechnaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been utilized in the treatment of various health conditions. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal medicine, Cyclosorus elatus can be prepared as a decoction or a poultice, often combined with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
